# Example 1: Simple Linear Process (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Basic process structure with user and service tasks
# Rules followed: ONE_START_EVENT, AT_LEAST_ONE_END_EVENT, ALL_OBJECTS_CONNECTED
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Submit Request", "user")
t2 = Task("task2", "Validate Request", "service")
t3 = Task("task3", "Review Application", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, t3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, end))
', '
# Example 2: Exclusive Gateway (XOR) - Decision Process (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Branching and merging with exclusive gateway
# Rules followed: GATEWAY_BRANCHING_RULE, PATH_SYMMETRY_RULE, EXCLUSIVE_GATEWAY_BEHAVIOR
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Loan Approval Process")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Submit Application", "user")
t2 = Task("task2", "Check Credit Score", "service")
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Credit Decision", "exclusive")  # Splitting gateway
t3 = Task("task3", "Approve Loan", "user")
t4 = Task("task4", "Reject Application", "user")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Merge", "exclusive")  # Joining gateway
t5 = Task("task5", "Notify Customer", "service")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t5)
p.add(end)

# Main flow
p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw1))
# Branching paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))  # Good credit path
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))  # Bad credit path
# Merging paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
# Continue after merge
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, end))
', '
# Example 3: Parallel Gateway (AND) - Concurrent Execution (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Parallel execution of tasks that must all complete
# Rules followed: PARALLEL_GATEWAY_BEHAVIOR, PATH_SYMMETRY_RULE
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Order Fulfillment Process")

t1 = Task("task1", "Receive Order", "user")
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Parallel Split", "parallel")  # Splitting gateway
t2 = Task("task2", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
t3 = Task("task3", "Generate Invoice", "service")
t4 = Task("task4", "Update Inventory", "service")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Parallel Join", "parallel")  # Joining gateway
t5 = Task("task5", "Send Notification", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t5)
p.add(end)

# Main flow
p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, gw1))
# Three parallel paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))
# All paths converge
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
# Continue after join
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, end))
', '

from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Data Processing Workflow")

t3 = Task("task3", "Save Results", "service")
t4 = Task("task4", "Log Error", "user")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Merge", "exclusive")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(t2)

p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw1))  # Script task MUST be followed by gateway
# Error handling paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))  # Success path
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))  # Error path
# Merge and end
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, end))
', '

start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Submit Expense", "user")

t2 = Task("task2", "Auto Approve", "service")

gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Manager Decision", "exclusive")
t4 = Task("task4", "Approve", "user")
t5 = Task("task5", "Reject", "user")
gw3 = Gateway("gw3", "Merge All", "exclusive")  # Merges all paths
t6 = Task("task6", "Notify Employee", "service")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t4)
p.add(t5)
p.add(gw3)
p.add(t6)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, gw1))
# First branch: amount-based
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t2))  # < $100
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))  # >= $100
# Second branch: manager decision
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t4))  # Approved
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))  # Rejected
# Merge all paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, gw3))
# Final notification
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw3, t6))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t6, end))

p.add(gw1)
p.add(t2)

p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t5)

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'receive order', 'user')
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'validate order', 'service')
prepare_payment_task = Task('prepare_payment', 'prepare for payment', 'script')

# Exclusive Gateway for script task error handling / decision
gw_payment_prep_result = Gateway('gw_payment_prep_result', 'Payment Prep Status', 'exclusive')

process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'process payment', 'service')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'ship order', 'user')

# Elements for error handling path
error_handling_task = Task('error_handling', 'Review Payment Prep Error', 'user')

# Joining Gateway to merge success and error handling paths before the final end event
gw_join_end = Gateway('gw_join_end', 'Process Concluded', 'exclusive')

end = EndEvent('end', 'Order Process End', event_type='none')

process = Process('Order Processing Workflow')

process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_task)
process.add(gw_payment_prep_result)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(error_handling_task)
process.add(gw_join_end) # Add the joining gateway to the process elements
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, prepare_payment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_task, gw_payment_prep_result)) # Script to splitting gateway

# Decision paths from splitting gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, process_payment_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, error_handling_task)) # Failure path

# Flows leading to the joining gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, ship_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, gw_join_end)) # Success path merges
process.add(SequenceFlow(error_handling_task, gw_join_end)) # Failure path merges

process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join_end, end)) # Joining gateway to final end event
```

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'receive order', 'user')
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'validate order', 'service')
# Added an intermediate script task to break the consecutive service tasks
prepare_payment_task = Task('prepare_payment', 'prepare for payment', 'script')
process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'process payment', 'service')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'ship order', 'user')
end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process = Process('Order Processing Workflow')

process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_task)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, prepare_payment_task)) # Flow to new script task
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_task, process_payment_task)) # Flow from new script task
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, ship_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, end))

ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'ship order', 'user')
end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process.add(prepare_payment_task)

process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, prepare_payment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_task, gateway_after_script)) # Script task now flows to gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gateway_after_script, process_payment_task)) # Gateway flows to next task
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, ship_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, end))

args.code:
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'receive order', 'user')
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'validate order', 'service')
prepare_payment_task = Task('prepare_payment', 'prepare for payment', 'script')

# Exclusive Gateway for script task error handling / decision
gw_payment_prep_result = Gateway('gw_payment_prep_result', 'Payment Prep Status', 'exclusive')

process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'process payment', 'service')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'ship order', 'user')

# New elements for error handling path
error_handling_task = Task('error_handling', 'Review Payment Prep Error', 'user')
payment_failed_end = EndEvent('payment_failed_end', 'Payment Failed End', event_type='none')

end = EndEvent('end', 'Order Completed End', event_type='none')

process = Process('Order Processing Workflow')

process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_task)
process.add(gw_payment_prep_result)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(error_handling_task)
process.add(payment_failed_end)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, prepare_payment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_task, gw_payment_prep_result)) # Script to gateway

# Decision paths from gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, process_payment_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, error_handling_task)) # Failure path

process.add(SequenceFlow(error_handling_task, payment_failed_end)) # Error path ends

process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, ship_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, end))

args.code:
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'receive order', 'user')
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'validate order', 'service')
prepare_payment_task = Task('prepare_payment', 'prepare for payment', 'script')

# Exclusive Gateway for script task error handling / decision
gw_payment_prep_result = Gateway('gw_payment_prep_result', 'Payment Prep Status', 'exclusive')

process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'process payment', 'service')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'ship order', 'user')

# Elements for error handling path
error_handling_task = Task('error_handling', 'Review Payment Prep Error', 'user')

# Joining Gateway to merge success and error handling paths before the final end event
gw_join_end = Gateway('gw_join_end', 'Process Concluded', 'exclusive')

end = EndEvent('end', 'Order Process End', event_type='none')

process = Process('Order Processing Workflow')

process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_task)
process.add(gw_payment_prep_result)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(error_handling_task)
process.add(gw_join_end) # Add the joining gateway to the process elements
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, prepare_payment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_task, gw_payment_prep_result)) # Script to splitting gateway

# Decision paths from splitting gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, process_payment_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, error_handling_task)) # Failure path

# Flows leading to the joining gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, ship_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, gw_join_end)) # Success path merges
process.add(SequenceFlow(error_handling_task, gw_join_end)) # Failure path merges

process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join_end, end)) # Joining gateway to final end event

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'receive order', 'user')
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'validate order', 'service')
prepare_payment_task = Task('prepare_payment', 'prepare for payment', 'script')

# Exclusive Gateway for script task error handling / decision
gw_payment_prep_result = Gateway('gw_payment_prep_result', 'Payment Prep Status', 'exclusive')

process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'process payment', 'service')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'ship order', 'user')

# Elements for error handling path
error_handling_task = Task('error_handling', 'Review Payment Prep Error', 'user')

# Joining Gateway to merge success and error handling paths before the final end event
gw_join_end = Gateway('gw_join_end', 'Process Concluded', 'exclusive')

end = EndEvent('end', 'Order Process End', event_type='none')

process = Process('Order Processing Workflow')

process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_task)
process.add(gw_payment_prep_result)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(error_handling_task)
process.add(gw_join_end) # Add the joining gateway to the process elements
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, prepare_payment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_task, gw_payment_prep_result)) # Script to splitting gateway

# Decision paths from splitting gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, process_payment_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_result, error_handling_task)) # Failure path

# Flows leading to the joining gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, ship_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, gw_join_end)) # Success path merges
process.add(SequenceFlow(error_handling_task, gw_join_end)) # Failure path merges

process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join_end, end)) # Joining gateway to final end event
```

You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements. Gateways must use valid BPMN 2.0 gateway types: exclusive (XOR - only one path), parallel (AND - all paths simultaneously), inclusive (OR - one or more paths), event_based (decision based on events), complex (complex decision logic). A valid BPMN process must have exactly one Start Event. A valid BPMN process must have at least one End Event.

Create a loan process: start → submit application → exclusive gateway checks credit → if good: parallel gateway (process docs AND verify income) → join → approve → end; if bad: reject → end

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Define Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Loan Application', event_type='none')
# We will use a single end event for the entire process after merging paths
final_end = EndEvent('final_end', 'Loan Process Ended', event_type='none')

# Define Tasks
submit_application_task = Task('submit_application', 'Submit Application', 'user')
process_documents_task = Task('process_documents', 'Process Documents', 'user')
verify_income_task = Task('verify_income', 'Verify Income', 'user')
approve_application_task = Task('approve_application', 'Approve Application', 'user')
reject_application_task = Task('reject_application', 'Reject Application', 'user')

# Define Gateways
credit_check_gateway = Gateway('credit_check_gateway', 'Credit Check', 'exclusive') # Splitting
parallel_split_gateway = Gateway('parallel_split_gateway', 'Parallel Split', 'parallel') # Splitting
parallel_join_gateway = Gateway('parallel_join_gateway', 'Parallel Join', 'parallel') # Joining

# New joining gateway to merge the approval and rejection paths
final_merge_gateway = Gateway('final_merge_gateway', 'Loan Decision Made', 'exclusive') # Joining

# Create Process and add elements
process = Process('Loan Application Workflow')
process.add(start)
process.add(submit_application_task)
process.add(credit_check_gateway)
process.add(parallel_split_gateway)
process.add(process_documents_task)
process.add(verify_income_task)
process.add(parallel_join_gateway)
process.add(approve_application_task)
process.add(reject_application_task)
process.add(final_merge_gateway) # Add the new merging gateway
process.add(final_end) # Use the single final end event

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit_application_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit_application_task, credit_check_gateway))

# Good Credit Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_check_gateway, parallel_split_gateway))
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_gateway, process_documents_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_gateway, verify_income_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_documents_task, parallel_join_gateway))
process.add(SequenceFlow(verify_income_task, parallel_join_gateway))
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_join_gateway, approve_application_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve_application_task, final_merge_gateway)) # Path to new merging gateway

# Bad Credit Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_check_gateway, reject_application_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject_application_task, final_merge_gateway)) # Path to new merging gateway

# Final flow from merging gateway to end event
process.add(SequenceFlow(final_merge_gateway, final_end))
```

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Invoice Process', event_type='none')
end = EndEvent('end', 'Invoice Process Complete', event_type='none')

# Tasks
receive_invoice_task = Task('receive_invoice', 'Receive Invoice', 'user')
validate_invoice_task = Task('validate_invoice', 'Validate Invoice', 'service')

# Intermediate script task to break consecutive service tasks and its error handling
prepare_payment_data_task = Task('prepare_payment_data', 'Prepare Payment Data', 'script')

# Gateway for decision after script task
gw_payment_prep_decision = Gateway('gw_payment_prep_decision', 'Payment Prep Status', 'exclusive')

# Error handling path elements
review_payment_error_task = Task('review_payment_error', 'Review Payment Prep Error', 'user')

process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'Process Payment', 'service')
archive_invoice_task = Task('archive_invoice', 'Archive Invoice', 'user')

# Joining gateway for the two paths before the final end event
gw_process_merge = Gateway('gw_process_merge', 'Invoice Process Merge', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add elements
process = Process('invoice_processing_workflow', 'Invoice Processing Workflow')
process.add(start)
process.add(receive_invoice_task)
process.add(validate_invoice_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_data_task)
process.add(gw_payment_prep_decision)
process.add(review_payment_error_task)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(archive_invoice_task)
process.add(gw_process_merge)
process.add(end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_invoice_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_invoice_task, validate_invoice_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_invoice_task, prepare_payment_data_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_data_task, gw_payment_prep_decision))

# Paths from payment prep decision gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_decision, process_payment_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_decision, review_payment_error_task)) # Error path

# Continue success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, archive_invoice_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(archive_invoice_task, gw_process_merge)) # Success path merges

# Continue error path
process.add(SequenceFlow(review_payment_error_task, gw_process_merge)) # Error path merges

# Final flow to end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_process_merge, end))

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Invoice Process', event_type='none')
end = EndEvent('end', 'Invoice Process Complete', event_type='none')

# Tasks
receive_invoice_task = Task('receive_invoice', 'Receive Invoice', 'user')
validate_invoice_task = Task('validate_invoice', 'Validate Invoice', 'service')

# Intermediate script task to break consecutive service tasks and its error handling
prepare_payment_data_task = Task('prepare_payment_data', 'Prepare Payment Data', 'script')

# Gateway for decision after script task
gw_payment_prep_decision = Gateway('gw_payment_prep_decision', 'Payment Prep Status', 'exclusive')

# Error handling path elements
review_payment_error_task = Task('review_payment_error', 'Review Payment Prep Error', 'user')

process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'Process Payment', 'service')
archive_invoice_task = Task('archive_invoice', 'Archive Invoice', 'user')

# Joining gateway for the two paths before the final end event
gw_process_merge = Gateway('gw_process_merge', 'Invoice Process Merge', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add elements
process = Process('Invoice Processing Workflow') # Corrected: only one argument for Process constructor
process.add(start)
process.add(receive_invoice_task)
process.add(validate_invoice_task)
process.add(prepare_payment_data_task)
process.add(gw_payment_prep_decision)
process.add(review_payment_error_task)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(archive_invoice_task)
process.add(gw_process_merge)
process.add(end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_invoice_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_invoice_task, validate_invoice_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_invoice_task, prepare_payment_data_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_payment_data_task, gw_payment_prep_decision))

# Paths from payment prep decision gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_decision, process_payment_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_payment_prep_decision, review_payment_error_task)) # Error path

# Continue success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, archive_invoice_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(archive_invoice_task, gw_process_merge)) # Success path merges

# Continue error path
process.add(SequenceFlow(review_payment_error_task, gw_process_merge)) # Error path merges

# Final flow to end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_process_merge, end))
```

process.add(receive_ticket_task)
process.add(wait_for_response_event)
process.add(process_response_task)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_ticket_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_ticket_task, wait_for_response_event))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_for_response_event, process_response_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_response_task, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
scan_task = Task('scan_task', 'Scan', 'user')
extract_task = Task('extract_task', 'Extract', 'service')
validate_task = Task('validate_task', 'Validate', 'user')
format_task = Task('format_task', 'Format', 'service')
archive_task = Task('archive_task', 'Archive', 'user')
end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process = Process('Too Many Sequential Tasks Process')

process.add(start)
process.add(scan_task)
process.add(extract_task)
process.add(validate_task)
process.add(format_task)
process.add(archive_task)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, scan_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(scan_task, extract_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(extract_task, validate_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_task, format_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(format_task, archive_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(archive_task, end))

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

# Tasks
collect_data_task = Task('collect_data', 'Collect Data', 'service')
prepare_transform_script = Task('prepare_transform', 'Prepare for Transformation', 'script')
transform_data_task = Task('transform_data', 'Transform Data', 'service')
validate_data_task = Task('validate_data', 'Validate Data', 'user')
store_data_task = Task('store_data', 'Store Data', 'service')
handle_script_error_task = Task('handle_script_error', 'Review Script Error', 'user') # For error path

# Gateways
gw_script_check = Gateway('gw_script_check', 'Script Result?', 'exclusive')
gw_final_merge = Gateway('gw_final_merge', 'Process Complete', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add elements
process = Process('Data Pipeline with 4 Core Steps (Valid)')
process.add(start)
process.add(collect_data_task)
process.add(prepare_transform_script)
process.add(gw_script_check)
process.add(transform_data_task)
process.add(validate_data_task)
process.add(store_data_task)
process.add(handle_script_error_task)
process.add(gw_final_merge)
process.add(end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, collect_data_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(collect_data_task, prepare_transform_script)) # Breaks service-service
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_transform_script, gw_script_check)) # Script to gateway

# Path from script result gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_script_check, transform_data_task)) # Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_script_check, handle_script_error_task)) # Error path

# Main pipeline flow (after successful script)
process.add(SequenceFlow(transform_data_task, validate_data_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_data_task, store_data_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(store_data_task, gw_final_merge)) # Merge point for success path

# Error path flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(handle_script_error_task, gw_final_merge)) # Merge point for error path

# Final flow to end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_final_merge, end))
```

results.full_query:
You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements. Every 'script' task must be followed by a decision gateway to handle potential script failures. A Gateway must conform to specific branching rules: a 'splitting' gateway must have exactly one incoming and at least two outgoing sequence flows. A 'joining' gateway must have multiple incoming flows and exactly one outgoing flow. Gateways with only one-in/one-out are redundant and not allowed. For every splitting gateway (one-in, multiple-out), there must be a corresponding joining gateway (multiple-in, one-out) that merges the paths originating from the splitting gateway. All paths from a split must eventually converge.

task1 = Task('task1', 'Task 1', 'abstract')
redundant_gateway = Gateway('redundant_gateway', 'Redundant Gateway', 'exclusive') # Deliberately one in, one out
task2 = Task('task2', 'Task 2', 'abstract')
end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process = Process('Redundant Gateway Process')

process.add(start)
process.add(task1)
process.add(redundant_gateway)
process.add(task2)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, task1))
process.add(SequenceFlow(task1, redundant_gateway)) # Incoming flow to redundant gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(redundant_gateway, task2)) # Outgoing flow from redundant gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(task2, end))

A 'joining' gateway must have multiple incoming flows and exactly one outgoing flow. Gateways with only one-in/one-out are redundant and not allowed. A valid BPMN process must have exactly one Start Event. A valid BPMN process must have at least one End Event.

args.code:
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
attempt_task = Task('attempt_task', 'Attempt Task', 'user')

# This is the gateway that decides if the attempt was successful or if a retry is needed. It splits.
check_result_gateway = Gateway('check_result_gateway', 'Check Result', 'exclusive')

# This is a joining gateway where all paths leading *to* an attempt (initial or retry) converge.
# It acts as the entry point to the loop.
loop_entry_join_gateway = Gateway('loop_entry_join_gateway', 'Proceed to Attempt', 'exclusive')

# This is a joining gateway where the successful exit from the loop merges before the final end.
final_process_merge_gateway = Gateway('final_process_merge_gateway', 'Process Finalized', 'exclusive')

end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process = Process('Retry Mechanism Process')

process.add(start)
process.add(attempt_task)
process.add(check_result_gateway)
process.add(loop_entry_join_gateway)
process.add(final_process_merge_gateway)
process.add(end)

# Initial flow into the loop
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, loop_entry_join_gateway))
process.add(SequenceFlow(loop_entry_join_gateway, attempt_task))

# After the attempt, decide to exit or retry
process.add(SequenceFlow(attempt_task, check_result_gateway))

# If successful: exit the loop and merge with the final flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_result_gateway, final_process_merge_gateway))

# If failed: loop back to the entry of the attempt
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_result_gateway, loop_entry_join_gateway))

# Final step after all processing (including retries) is done
process.add(SequenceFlow(final_process_merge_gateway, end))

args.code:
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
task1 = Task('task1', 'Initial Task', 'abstract')

# Gateway that splits, one path loops, one path exits
gateway1_split = Gateway('gateway1_split', 'Loop Decision', 'exclusive')

# Gateway that closes the loop back to gateway1_split (forms the empty loop)
gateway2_loop_back = Gateway('gateway2_loop_back', 'Loop Back', 'exclusive')

end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process = Process('Empty Loop Process')

process.add(start)
process.add(task1)
process.add(gateway1_split)
process.add(gateway2_loop_back)
process.add(end)

# Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, task1))
process.add(SequenceFlow(task1, gateway1_split))

# Loop path: gateway1_split -> gateway2_loop_back -> gateway1_split (no task in loop)
process.add(SequenceFlow(gateway1_split, gateway2_loop_back)) # Path into the empty loop
process.add(SequenceFlow(gateway2_loop_back, gateway1_split)) # Loops back to the splitting gateway

# Exit path from the loop
process.add(SequenceFlow(gateway1_split, end)) # Exits the loop directly to end

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')
```
process_task = Task('process_task', 'Process Task', 'user')

```python
# Create a splitting gateway that always loops back, simulating no exit condition
loop_decision_gateway = Gateway('loop_decision_gateway', 'Continue Loop?', 'exclusive')

# The end event is included in the process but no flow will lead to it, creating an unreachable end.
end = EndEvent('end', 'End Event', event_type='none')

process = Process('Infinite Loop Process')

process.add(start)
process.add(process_task)
process.add(loop_decision_gateway)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, process_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_task, loop_decision_gateway))
# This flow creates the infinite loop, as there is no other outgoing path from the gateway.
process.add(SequenceFlow(loop_decision_gateway, process_task))

# The 'end' event is intentionally left unreachable to demonstrate the lack of an exit path.
```

results.full_query:
You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements. For every splitting gateway (one-in, multiple-out), there must be a corresponding joining gateway (multiple-in, one-out) that merges the paths originating from the splitting gateway. All paths from a split must eventually converge. A Gateway must conform to specific branching rules: a 'splitting' gateway must have exactly one incoming and at least two outgoing sequence flows. A 'joining' gateway must have multiple incoming flows and exactly one outgoing flow. Gateways with only one-in/one-out are redundant and not allowed. A valid BPMN process must have exactly one Start Event. A valid BPMN process must have at least one End Event.

Create a symmetric branching process: start → split gateway (exclusive) → path1: approve task, path2: reject task → join gateway (exclusive) → notify (service) → end

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow
```

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Order Process', event_type='none')
end = EndEvent('end', 'Order Completed', event_type='none')

# Tasks
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'Receive Order', 'user')
process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'Process Payment', 'service')
prepare_shipment_task = Task('prepare_shipment', 'Prepare Shipment', 'service')
quality_check_task = Task('quality_check', 'Quality Check', 'user')
rework_shipment_task = Task('rework_shipment', 'Rework Shipment', 'user')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'Ship Order', 'user')

# Gateways
parallel_split_initial_gw = Gateway('parallel_split_initial_gw', 'Initial Parallel Split', 'parallel')
parallel_join_final_gw = Gateway('parallel_join_final_gw', 'Final Parallel Join', 'parallel')
quality_check_decision_gw = Gateway('quality_check_decision_gw', 'Quality OK?', 'exclusive')
loop_entry_join_gw = Gateway('loop_entry_join_gw', 'Start/Retry Shipment Process', 'exclusive') # To manage loop entry

# Create Process and add elements
process = Process('Comprehensive Order Workflow')
process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(parallel_split_initial_gw)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(prepare_shipment_task)
process.add(quality_check_task)
process.add(rework_shipment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(parallel_join_final_gw)
process.add(quality_check_decision_gw)
process.add(loop_entry_join_gw)
process.add(end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, parallel_split_initial_gw))

# Parallel Branch 1: Payment
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_initial_gw, process_payment_task))

# Parallel Branch 2: Shipment (with nested loop)
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_initial_gw, loop_entry_join_gw)) # Initial entry into shipment path

# Inside the Shipment Loop
process.add(SequenceFlow(loop_entry_join_gw, prepare_shipment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment_task, quality_check_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check_task, quality_check_decision_gw))

# Quality Check Decision
# Path: Quality Pass
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check_decision_gw, ship_order_task))

# Path: Quality Fail (Loop Back)
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check_decision_gw, rework_shipment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework_shipment_task, loop_entry_join_gw)) # Loop back to start shipment process

# Merge points for parallel branches before final join
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, parallel_join_final_gw))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, parallel_join_final_gw))

# Final Flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_join_final_gw, end))

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Order Process', event_type='none')
end = EndEvent('end', 'Order Completed', event_type='none')

# Tasks
receive_order_task = Task('receive_order', 'Receive Order', 'user')
process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'Process Payment', 'service')
prepare_shipment_task = Task('prepare_shipment', 'Prepare Shipment', 'service')
quality_check_task = Task('quality_check', 'Quality Check', 'user')
rework_shipment_task = Task('rework_shipment', 'Rework Shipment', 'user')
ship_order_task = Task('ship_order', 'Ship Order', 'user')

# Gateways
parallel_split_initial_gw = Gateway('parallel_split_initial_gw', 'Initial Parallel Split', 'parallel')
parallel_join_final_gw = Gateway('parallel_join_final_gw', 'Final Parallel Join', 'parallel')
quality_check_decision_gw = Gateway('quality_check_decision_gw', 'Quality OK?', 'exclusive')
loop_entry_join_gw = Gateway('loop_entry_join_gw', 'Start/Retry Shipment Process', 'exclusive') # To manage loop entry

# Create Process and add elements
process = Process('Comprehensive Order Workflow')
process.add(start)
process.add(receive_order_task)
process.add(parallel_split_initial_gw)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(prepare_shipment_task)
process.add(quality_check_task)
process.add(rework_shipment_task)
process.add(ship_order_task)
process.add(parallel_join_final_gw)
process.add(quality_check_decision_gw)
process.add(loop_entry_join_gw)
process.add(end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_order_task, parallel_split_initial_gw))

# Parallel Branch 1: Payment
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_initial_gw, process_payment_task))

# Parallel Branch 2: Shipment (with nested loop)
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_initial_gw, loop_entry_join_gw)) # Initial entry into shipment path

# Inside the Shipment Loop
process.add(SequenceFlow(loop_entry_join_gw, prepare_shipment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment_task, quality_check_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check_task, quality_check_decision_gw))

# Quality Check Decision
# Path: Quality Pass
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check_decision_gw, ship_order_task))

# Path: Quality Fail (Loop Back)
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check_decision_gw, rework_shipment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework_shipment_task, loop_entry_join_gw)) # Loop back to start shipment process

# Merge points for parallel branches before final join
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, parallel_join_final_gw))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_order_task, parallel_join_final_gw))

# Final Flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_join_final_gw, end))
```

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Order Fulfillment', event_type='none')
success_end = EndEvent('success_end', 'Order Fulfilled', event_type='none')
failure_end = EndEvent('failure_end', 'Order Canceled', event_type='none')

# Tasks
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'Validate Order', 'user')
check_inventory_task = Task('check_inventory', 'Check Inventory', 'service')
process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'Process Payment', 'service')
prepare_shipment_task = Task('prepare_shipment', 'Prepare Shipment', 'user')
ship_task = Task('ship', 'Ship Order', 'service')
cancel_order_task = Task('cancel_order', 'Cancel Order', 'user')

# Gateways
parallel_split_gw = Gateway('parallel_split_gw', 'Parallel Split for Processing', 'parallel')
parallel_join_gw = Gateway('parallel_join_gw', 'Parallel Join after Processing', 'parallel')
check_results_gw = Gateway('check_results_gw', 'Check Overall Results', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add all elements
process = Process('Comprehensive Order Fulfillment Workflow')
process.add(start)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(parallel_split_gw)
process.add(check_inventory_task)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(parallel_join_gw)
process.add(check_results_gw)
process.add(prepare_shipment_task)
process.add(ship_task)
process.add(cancel_order_task)
process.add(success_end)
process.add(failure_end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, parallel_split_gw))

# Parallel paths after split
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_gw, check_inventory_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_gw, process_payment_task))

# Join parallel paths
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_inventory_task, parallel_join_gw))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, parallel_join_gw))

# After parallel join, go to exclusive gateway to check results
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_join_gw, check_results_gw))

# Exclusive gateway branches
# Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results_gw, prepare_shipment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment_task, ship_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_task, success_end))

# Failure path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results_gw, cancel_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(cancel_order_task, failure_end))

You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements. A valid BPMN process must have exactly one Start Event. A valid BPMN process must have at least one End Event. A 'service' task cannot be directly followed by another 'service' task. There must be an intermediate 'user' task, 'script' task, or a gateway between them. No more than four tasks of any type should be chained in a sequence without an intermediate event or gateway. A Gateway must conform to specific branching rules: a 'splitting' gateway must have exactly one incoming and at least two outgoing sequence flows. A 'joining' gateway must have multiple incoming flows and exactly one outgoing flow. Gateways with only one-in/one-out are redundant and not allowed. Parallel gateways (AND) execute all outgoing paths simultaneously when splitting, and wait for all incoming paths to complete before proceeding when joining. For every splitting gateway (one-in, multiple-out), there must be a corresponding joining gateway (multiple-in, one-out) that merges the paths originating from the splitting gateway. All paths from a split must eventually converge. All flow objects must be reachable from the Start Event. There should be no isolated subgraphs or unreachable nodes in the process. Every flow object must have at least one path leading to an End Event. Avoid dead ends where execution cannot reach termination.

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Order Fulfillment', event_type='none')
final_end = EndEvent('final_end', 'Order Process Complete', event_type='none') # Single final end event

# Tasks
validate_order_task = Task('validate_order', 'Validate Order', 'user')
check_inventory_task = Task('check_inventory', 'Check Inventory', 'service')
process_payment_task = Task('process_payment', 'Process Payment', 'service')
prepare_shipment_task = Task('prepare_shipment', 'Prepare Shipment', 'user')
ship_task = Task('ship', 'Ship Order', 'service')
cancel_order_task = Task('cancel_order', 'Cancel Order', 'user')

# Gateways
parallel_split_gw = Gateway('parallel_split_gw', 'Parallel Split for Processing', 'parallel')
parallel_join_gw = Gateway('parallel_join_gw', 'Parallel Join after Processing', 'parallel')
check_results_gw = Gateway('check_results_gw', 'Check Overall Results', 'exclusive')
final_merge_gw = Gateway('final_merge_gw', 'Final Process Merge', 'exclusive') # Added joining gateway

# Create Process and add all elements
process = Process('Comprehensive Order Fulfillment Workflow')
process.add(start)
process.add(validate_order_task)
process.add(parallel_split_gw)
process.add(check_inventory_task)
process.add(process_payment_task)
process.add(parallel_join_gw)
process.add(check_results_gw)
process.add(prepare_shipment_task)
process.add(ship_task)
process.add(cancel_order_task)
process.add(final_merge_gw) # Add the new joining gateway
process.add(final_end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, validate_order_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate_order_task, parallel_split_gw))

# Parallel paths after split
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_gw, check_inventory_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_split_gw, process_payment_task))

# Join parallel paths
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_inventory_task, parallel_join_gw))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment_task, parallel_join_gw))

# After parallel join, go to exclusive gateway to check results
process.add(SequenceFlow(parallel_join_gw, check_results_gw))

# Exclusive gateway branches
# Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results_gw, prepare_shipment_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment_task, ship_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship_task, final_merge_gw)) # Path to final merge

# Failure path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results_gw, cancel_order_task))
```

check_credit_task = Task('check_credit', 'Check Credit', 'service')
generate_offer_task = Task('generate_offer', 'Generate Offer', 'service')

wait_for_docs_event = IntermediateCatchEvent('wait_for_docs', 'Wait for Documents', event_type='message')

# Gateways

initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw = Gateway('initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw', 'Initiate/Re-evaluate Check', 'exclusive')

# This is the splitting gateway for credit decision (Approved, Review, Rejected).
credit_decision_gw = Gateway('credit_decision_gw', 'Credit Decision', 'exclusive')

# This gateway merges all final paths (Approved, Rejected, or after a successful review) before the final end event.
final_merge_gw = Gateway('final_merge_gw', 'Loan Decision Made', 'exclusive')

process = Process('Loan Approval Process')
process.add(start)
process.add(submit_application_task)
process.add(initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw)

process.add(final_merge_gw)
process.add(final_end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit_application_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit_application_task, initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw))

# Flow from joining gateway to credit check task (initial and loop path)
process.add(SequenceFlow(initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw, check_credit_task))

# Flow from credit check to decision gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_credit_task, credit_decision_gw))

# --- Paths from Credit Decision Gateway ---

# 1. Approved Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, generate_offer_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(generate_offer_task, final_merge_gw))

# 2. Review Needed Path (Loop Back)
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, wait_for_docs_event))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_for_docs_event, re_evaluate_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(re_evaluate_task, initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw)) # Loop back

# 3. Rejected Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, notify_rejection_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify_rejection_task, final_merge_gw))

# Final flow from merging gateway to the end event
process.add(SequenceFlow(final_merge_gw, final_end))

You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements. A valid BPMN process must have exactly one Start Event. A valid BPMN process must have at least one End Event. Intermediate Events must have both incoming and outgoing sequence flows. Exclusive gateways (XOR) must have exactly one path selected based on conditions. All outgoing flows from a splitting exclusive gateway should have mutually exclusive conditions. A Gateway must conform to specific branching rules: a 'splitting' gateway must have exactly one incoming and at least two outgoing sequence flows. A 'joining' gateway must have multiple incoming flows and exactly one outgoing flow. Gateways with only one-in/one-out are redundant and not allowed. A loop must be properly structured: it must originate from a gateway, contain at least one task, and have a clear exit path. An endless loop without an exit condition is not allowed. For every splitting gateway (one-in, multiple-out), there must be a corresponding joining gateway (multiple-in, one-out) that merges the paths originating from the splitting gateway. All paths from a split must eventually converge.

```python
initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw = Gateway('initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw', 'Initiate/Re-evaluate Check', 'exclusive')

# This is the splitting gateway for credit decision (Approved, Review, Rejected).
credit_decision_gw = Gateway('credit_decision_gw', 'Credit Decision', 'exclusive')

# This gateway merges all final paths (Approved, Rejected, or after a successful review) before the final end event.
final_merge_gw = Gateway('final_merge_gw', 'Loan Decision Made', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add all elements
process = Process('Loan Approval Process')
process.add(start)
process.add(submit_application_task)
process.add(initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw)
process.add(check_credit_task)
process.add(credit_decision_gw)
process.add(generate_offer_task)
process.add(wait_for_docs_event)
process.add(re_evaluate_task)
process.add(notify_rejection_task)
process.add(final_merge_gw)
process.add(final_end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit_application_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit_application_task, initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw))

# Flow from joining gateway to credit check task (initial and loop path)
process.add(SequenceFlow(initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw, check_credit_task))

# Flow from credit check to decision gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_credit_task, credit_decision_gw))

# --- Paths from Credit Decision Gateway ---

# 1. Approved Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, generate_offer_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(generate_offer_task, final_merge_gw))

# 2. Review Needed Path (Loop Back)
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, wait_for_docs_event))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_for_docs_event, re_evaluate_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(re_evaluate_task, initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw)) # Loop back

# 3. Rejected Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, notify_rejection_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify_rejection_task, final_merge_gw))

# Final flow from merging gateway to the end event
process.add(SequenceFlow(final_merge_gw, final_end))
```

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Loan Application', event_type='none')
# Using a single end event for overall process termination.
final_end = EndEvent('final_end', 'Loan Process Concluded', event_type='none')

# Tasks
submit_application_task = Task('submit_application', 'Submit Application', 'user')
check_credit_task = Task('check_credit', 'Check Credit', 'service')
generate_offer_task = Task('generate_offer', 'Generate Offer', 'service')
re_evaluate_task = Task('re_evaluate', 'Re-evaluate Application', 'abstract') # Changed to abstract to satisfy rules
notify_rejection_task = Task('notify_rejection', 'Notify Rejection', 'service')

# Intermediate Catch Event
wait_for_docs_event = IntermediateCatchEvent('wait_for_docs', 'Wait for Documents', event_type='message')

# Gateways
# This gateway handles both initial entry to credit check and loop-back for re-evaluation.
initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw = Gateway('initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw', 'Initiate/Re-evaluate Check', 'exclusive')

# This is the splitting gateway for credit decision (Approved, Review, Rejected).
credit_decision_gw = Gateway('credit_decision_gw', 'Credit Decision', 'exclusive')

# This gateway merges all final paths (Approved, Rejected, or after a successful review) before the final end event.
final_merge_gw = Gateway('final_merge_gw', 'Loan Decision Made', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add all elements
process = Process('Loan Approval Process')
process.add(start)
process.add(submit_application_task)
process.add(initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw)
process.add(check_credit_task)
process.add(credit_decision_gw)
process.add(generate_offer_task)
process.add(wait_for_docs_event)
process.add(re_evaluate_task)
process.add(notify_rejection_task)
process.add(final_merge_gw)
process.add(final_end)

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit_application_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit_application_task, initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw))

# Flow from joining gateway to credit check task (initial and loop path)
process.add(SequenceFlow(initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw, check_credit_task))

# Flow from credit check to decision gateway
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_credit_task, credit_decision_gw))

# --- Paths from Credit Decision Gateway ---

# 1. Approved Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, generate_offer_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(generate_offer_task, final_merge_gw))

# 2. Review Needed Path (Loop Back)
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, wait_for_docs_event))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_for_docs_event, re_evaluate_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(re_evaluate_task, initiate_re_evaluate_join_gw)) # Loop back

# 3. Rejected Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(credit_decision_gw, notify_rejection_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify_rejection_task, final_merge_gw))

# Final flow from merging gateway to the end event
process.add(SequenceFlow(final_merge_gw, final_end))

You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements. A valid BPMN process must have exactly one Start Event. A valid BPMN process must have at least one End Event. Intermediate Events must have both incoming and outgoing sequence flows. A Gateway must conform to specific branching rules: a 'splitting' gateway must have exactly one incoming and at least two outgoing sequence flows. A 'joining' gateway must have multiple incoming flows and exactly one outgoing flow. Gateways with only one-in/one-out are redundant and not allowed. For every splitting gateway (one-in, multiple-out), there must be a corresponding joining gateway (multiple-in, one-out) that merges the paths originating from the splitting gateway. All paths from a split must eventually converge. All flow objects must be reachable from the Start Event. There should be no isolated subgraphs or unreachable nodes in the process.

Create a customer support escalation: start → receive ticket (user) → priority gateway (exclusive) → high priority: immediate response (user) → end; normal priority: wait for assignment (intermediate timer) → assign agent (service) → process (user) → satisfaction check gateway → if satisfied: close → end; if not: escalate (user) → manager review (user) → end

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

# Events
start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Ticket Process', event_type='none')
# Using a single end event for overall process termination.
final_end = EndEvent('final_end', 'Process Concluded', event_type='none')

# Tasks
receive_ticket_task = Task('receive_ticket', 'Receive Ticket', 'user')
immediate_response_task = Task('immediate_response', 'Immediate Response', 'user')
assign_agent_task = Task('assign_agent', 'Assign Agent', 'service')
process_ticket_task = Task('process_ticket', 'Process Ticket', 'user')
close_ticket_task = Task('close_ticket', 'Close Ticket', 'user')
escalate_ticket_task = Task('escalate_ticket', 'Escalate Ticket', 'user')
manager_review_task = Task('manager_review', 'Manager Review', 'user')

# Intermediate Events
wait_for_assignment_event = IntermediateCatchEvent('wait_for_assignment', 'Wait for Assignment', event_type='timer')

# Gateways
priority_split_gw = Gateway('priority_split_gw', 'Ticket Priority', 'exclusive')
satisfaction_split_gw = Gateway('satisfaction_split_gw', 'Customer Satisfied?', 'exclusive')
# New joining gateway for paths from the priority split
priority_join_gw = Gateway('priority_join_gw', 'Priority Path Merged', 'exclusive')
# New joining gateway for paths from the satisfaction split
satisfaction_join_gw = Gateway('satisfaction_join_gw', 'Satisfaction Path Merged', 'exclusive')

# Create Process and add all elements
process = Process('Customer Support Escalation')
process.add(start)
process.add(receive_ticket_task)
process.add(priority_split_gw)
process.add(immediate_response_task)
process.add(wait_for_assignment_event)
process.add(assign_agent_task)
process.add(process_ticket_task)
process.add(satisfaction_split_gw)
process.add(close_ticket_task)
process.add(escalate_ticket_task)
process.add(manager_review_task)
process.add(priority_join_gw) # Add new joining gateway
process.add(satisfaction_join_gw) # Add new joining gateway
process.add(final_end) # Use the single final end event

# Define Sequence Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive_ticket_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive_ticket_task, priority_split_gw))

# High Priority Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(priority_split_gw, immediate_response_task)) # Path A
process.add(SequenceFlow(immediate_response_task, priority_join_gw)) # Merge for High Priority

# Normal Priority Path
process.add(SequenceFlow(priority_split_gw, wait_for_assignment_event)) # Path B start
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_for_assignment_event, assign_agent_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(assign_agent_task, process_ticket_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_ticket_task, satisfaction_split_gw))

# Satisfaction Check Paths
process.add(SequenceFlow(satisfaction_split_gw, close_ticket_task)) # If satisfied Path B1
process.add(SequenceFlow(close_ticket_task, satisfaction_join_gw)) # Merge for Satisfied

process.add(SequenceFlow(satisfaction_split_gw, escalate_ticket_task)) # If not satisfied Path B2
process.add(SequenceFlow(escalate_ticket_task, manager_review_task))
```

final_end = EndEvent('final_end', 'Process Concluded', event_type='none')

# Tasks
receive_ticket_task = Task('receive_ticket', 'Receive Ticket', 'user')
immediate_response_task = Task('immediate_response', 'Immediate Response', 'user')

# Intermediate Events

# Gateways
priority_split_gw = Gateway('priority_split_gw', 'Ticket Priority', 'exclusive')
satisfaction_split_gw = Gateway('satisfaction_split_gw', 'Customer Satisfied?', 'exclusive')
# New joining gateway for paths from the priority split
priority_join_gw = Gateway('priority_join_gw', 'Priority Path Merged', 'exclusive')
# New joining gateway for paths from the satisfaction split

# Satisfaction Check Paths

process.add(SequenceFlow(close_ticket_task, satisfaction_join_gw)) # Merge for Satisfied

# Final flow to the end event
process.add(SequenceFlow(priority_join_gw, final_end))

```python
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow
```

start = StartEvent('start', 'Start Event', event_type='none')

task1_user = Task('task1', 'User Task 1', 'user')
task2_service = Task('task2', 'Service Task 1', 'service')
task3_service_consecutive = Task('task3', 'Service Task 2 (Consecutive)', 'service') # Consecutive service task
task4_script = Task('task4', 'Script Task (No Error Handling)', 'script') # Script task
task5_user = Task('task5', 'User Task 5', 'user')

another_input_task = Task('another_input', 'Another Input Task', 'abstract') # For multiple incoming to gateway

problematic_gateway = Gateway('problematic_gateway', 'Combined Split/Join Gateway', 'exclusive') # Multiple in, multiple out

dead_end_task = Task('dead_end_task', 'Dead-End Task', 'user') # Dead end

end = EndEvent('end', 'Unreachable End', event_type='none') # Unreachable end event

process = Process('Deliberately Broken Process')

process.add(start)
process.add(task1_user)
process.add(task2_service)
process.add(task3_service_consecutive)
process.add(task4_script)
process.add(task5_user)
process.add(another_input_task)
process.add(problematic_gateway)
process.add(dead_end_task)
process.add(end)

# Main sequential flow (exceeds 4 tasks, includes consecutive service and script no error handling)
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, task1_user))
process.add(SequenceFlow(task1_user, task2_service))
process.add(SequenceFlow(task2_service, task3_service_consecutive)) # VIOLATION: Consecutive Service Tasks
process.add(SequenceFlow(task3_service_consecutive, task4_script))
process.add(SequenceFlow(task4_script, task5_user)) # VIOLATION: Script task not followed by a Gateway

# VIOLATION: Problematic Gateway (Multiple incoming, multiple outgoing)
# Incoming flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(task5_user, problematic_gateway))
process.add(SequenceFlow(another_input_task, problematic_gateway))

# Outgoing flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(problematic_gateway, start)) # VIOLATION: Loop back to Start Event
process.add(SequenceFlow(problematic_gateway, dead_end_task)) # VIOLATION: Path to Dead-End Task

# No outgoing flow from dead_end_task, making it a dead end.
# The 'end' event is in the process but unreachable.
